stemHtml: Which statement about the Polar Stereographic Chart is true?

options.a: The closer to the pole, the more a great circle will coincide with the straight line on the chart.
options.b: The exact great circle is convex to the pole.
options.c: In general the distance in NM along the straight line on the chart will be closer to the rhumb line distance than to the great circle distance.
options.d: The distance in NM between 2 positions along the straight line on the chart is shorter than the distance along the great circle.
